basic_details.short_information: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics. Candidates with Graduation Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 23-05-2026, and closes on 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through WAMUL official website.

age_limit.age_details: Not above 28 years as on 1st January, 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduation from a recognized Institute/University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Recruitment 2026.
